# Somalia

**Summary**: A country in the Horn of Africa with an arid to semi-arid climate.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] studied groundwater resources across various regions of Somalia.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] Horn of Africa; influenced by East African Rift and Gulf of Aden formation.

## Formations Present

- [[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993]] baidoa-formation, merca--formation, urado-formation, taler-formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- Average annual rainfall is 300mm, while potential evaporation is 2300mm/year. ([[1993-moallim|Moallim, 1993, p. 34]])
